D5 Design L4 Analyze Reference

Cividis: CVD-Safe

a colormap built for colour-blind vision — see it survive deuteranopia where jet falls apart

Cividis was optimised so that people with red-green colour vision deficiency read it the same as everyone else: a blue-to-yellow ramp whose order survives because it avoids the red-green axis entirely. Jet leans on exactly that axis, so under CVD its middle muddles.

Choose a deficiency type. The top ramp is cividis as designed; the middle is cividis as that viewer sees it — still ordered. The bottom is jet under the same simulation, where the sequence collapses.
